subcodes.first_line: A Book revealed by the All-Merciful, wherein He beareth glad tidings unto all who dwell within the realm of contingent being of this Manifestation that was promised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن و فیه یبشر من فی الامکان الی هذا الظهور الذی کان موعودا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Word of God and human limitations
